lagConvention: positive lag means the international commodity index is observed before the domestic consumer-price index

rows.lag_convention: positive lag means international commodity price is observed before domestic consumer price
rows.limitations: Bivariate latest-vintage association; baskets, exchange rates, lags, margins, policy, and common shocks differ. Correlation is not causation.
